title: luma gilliesii
intro: Luma gilliesii, also known as the Chilean laurel, is a flowering plant species native to South America, particularly in the temperate regions of Chile and Argentina. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Luma gilliesii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for herbal use, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
